summary: Admin Link feature testing completed. Found and fixed 1 critical bug: PublicOnlyRoute was ignoring location.state.from, causing redirect to /dashboard instead of /admin after login. All 12 test cases now pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin link feature is fully functional. Fixed PublicOnlyRoute to respect location.state.from for redirect-after-login flows. All data-testids work: marketing-admin-link (desktop), marketing-admin-link-mobile (mobile), marketing-go-dashboard-btn (when authenticated).

admin_link_visibility: Admin link (Shield icon + 'Admin' text) visible on desktop marketing nav on / page - PASS
Admin link visible on desktop marketing nav on /leaderboard page - PASS
Admin link visible on desktop marketing nav on /pricing page - PASS
Admin link visible in mobile hamburger menu below Get Started on / page - PASS
admin_link_authentication_behavior: Admin link NOT visible inside authenticated app shell (e.g. /dashboard after login) - PASS
Admin link disappears from marketing nav when user is authenticated (shows Dashboard button instead) - PASS
Admin link NOT visible in mobile menu when authenticated - PASS
admin_link_navigation: Clicking Admin link navigates to /admin - PASS
When not logged in, /admin redirects to /login - PASS
After logging in from that redirect, user is sent to /admin (not /dashboard) - PASS (after fix)
admin_link_styling: Admin link has purple hover state on desktop (#7B61FF) - PASS
existing_features: No impact on existing Live Mode, Demo Mode, or admin badge logic - PASS

bug_fixed.issue: After clicking Admin link when logged out, logging in redirected to /dashboard instead of /admin
bug_fixed.root_cause: PublicOnlyRoute in RouteGuards.jsx was hardcoded to redirect to '/dashboard' when authenticated, ignoring location.state.from
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Updated PublicOnlyRoute to read location.state?.from and use it as redirect target, falling back to '/dashboard' if not present
bug_fixed.verification: Tested Admin → Login → /admin flow, now correctly redirects to /admin after login
